# design-system.md — La Polla
# Full token reference, animation library, component specs
# Generated by nextjs-ui-system skill

---

## Design Direction Summary

| Property | Decision |
|---|---|
| Aesthetic pole | Kinetic-sports: dark, high-contrast, stadium energy |
| User feeling | VIP section of a stadium at night. Premium, electric, immersive |
| Reference feel | Sleeper app + Sorare + FotMob dark + Polymarket |
| Theme | Dark only |
| Motion personality | Kinetic/expressive (300-500ms, spring physics, staggered) |
| Surface style | Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur + semi-transparent bg + subtle border) |

---

## Libraries In Use

| Library | Purpose | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Framer Motion | All animation: entrances, score pops, count-up, page transitions | Default motion library |
| Lucide React | All icons: navigation, UI, status indicators | Replace all emojis |
| clsx + tailwind-merge | Clean conditional class merging | cn() utility |
| Tailwind CSS | All styling | Existing config, do not migrate to v4 |
| Next.js 14 | Framework | App Router, do not upgrade to 15 |
| Supabase | Backend | Do not touch |

NOT in use (intentionally excluded): GSAP, Lenis, Aceternity UI, Magic UI, shadcn/ui, Vaul, cmdk

---

## Typography

### Fonts

| Role | Font | Weights | Variable |
|---|---|---|---|
| Display | Bebas Neue | 400 | --font-display |
| Body | Outfit | 300, 400, 500, 600, 700 | --font-body |

### Usage Rules

| Element | Font | Example |
|---|---|---|
| Match scores | Bebas Neue, text-4xl+ | "3 - 1" |
| Point totals | Bebas Neue, text-2xl+ | "45 pts" |
| Leaderboard positions | Bebas Neue, text-xl | "#1", "#2" |
| Section headers | Bebas Neue, text-xl tracking-wide uppercase | "MIS POLLAS" |
| Step numbers | Bebas Neue, text-lg | "1", "2", "3" |
| Body text | Outfit, text-sm/text-base | Descriptions, labels |
| Button text | Outfit, font-medium/font-semibold | "Crear Polla" |
| Input text | Outfit, text-sm | Form fields |
| Nav labels | Outfit, text-xs font-medium | "Inicio", "Crear" |

---

## Color Palette

### Backgrounds (darkest to lightest)

| Token | Hex | Tailwind | Use |
|---|---|---|---|
| bg-base | #080c10 | bg-bg-base | Page background |
| bg-card | #0e1420 | bg-card | Card surfaces |
| bg-card-hover | #152032 | bg-card-hover | Hover states, pressed cards |
| bg-elevated | #192840 | bg-elevated | Modals, inputs, elevated surfaces |

### Text

| Token | Hex | Tailwind | Contrast on bg-card |
|---|---|---|---|
| text-primary | #eef2ff | text-text-primary | 14.2:1 |
| text-secondary | #7089aa | text-text-secondary | 4.8:1 |
| text-muted | #3d5470 | text-muted | 2.5:1 (decorative only) |

### Accents

| Token | Hex | Tailwind | Use |
|---|---|---|---|
| gold | #FFD700 | text-gold / bg-gold | Primary accent, CTAs, active states, winners |
| green-live | #00e676 | text-green-live / bg-green-live | Live matches, success, correct predictions |
| red-alert | #ff3d57 | text-red-alert / bg-red-alert | Errors, wrong predictions, alerts |

### Borders

| Token | Hex | Tailwind | Use |
|---|---|---|---|
| border-subtle | #1a2535 | border-subtle | Default borders, dividers |

### Opacity Variants (for muted backgrounds)

| Pattern | Tailwind | Use |
|---|---|---|
| Gold muted | bg-gold/10 | Active nav pill, selected chips |
| Gold border | border-gold/20 or /30 | Hover borders, featured cards |
| Gold glow | shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,215,0,0.15)] | Important gold elements |
| Green muted | bg-green-live/10 | Live indicator backgrounds |
| Red muted | bg-red-alert/10 | Error state backgrounds |

---

## Spacing

Base: 4px. Mobile-first (390px base width).

| Use | Value | Tailwind |
|---|---|---|
| Card internal padding | 16px | p-4 |
| Card gap in lists | 12px | gap-3 |
| Section padding | 16-24px horizontal | px-4 or px-6 |
| Page top padding | 16px | pt-4 |
| Page bottom padding (above nav) | 80px | pb-20 |
| Touch target minimum | 44px | min-h-[44px] |

---

## Border Radius

| Use | Value | Tailwind |
|---|---|---|
| Primary cards | 16px | rounded-2xl |
| Secondary cards, inputs | 12px | rounded-xl |
| Buttons | 12px | rounded-xl |
| Badges, pills | 9999px | rounded-full |
| Avatars | 9999px | rounded-full |

---

## Shadow System

| Token | Value | Use |
|---|---|---|
| Gold glow subtle | shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(255,215,0,0.1)] | Selected chips, active steps |
| Gold glow medium | shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,215,0,0.15)] | Featured cards, important elements |
| Gold glow strong | shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(255,215,0,0.25)] | CTA buttons on hover |
| Card shadow | shadow-lg | Elevated cards |
| None | (default) | Most cards use border, not shadow |

---

## Animation System

### Duration Tokens

| Name | Value | Use |
|---|---|---|
| fast | 150ms | Button presses, toggles |
| normal | 250ms | Default transitions |
| medium | 350ms | Card entrances, stagger |
| slow | 500ms | Page transitions |

### Patterns Used

| Pattern | Where | Implementation |
|---|---|---|
| Staggered entrance | Card lists, leaderboard rows | staggerContainer + fadeUp variants |
| Fade up | Individual cards entering view | fadeUp variant with whileInView |
| Score pop | Match scores, point totals | scorePop variant (scale 0.5 to 1 with spring) |
| Count-up | Points on leaderboard, stats | useMotionValue + useSpring |
| Page fade | Route changes | fadeIn on page mount |
| Pulse | Live match indicator | CSS animate-pulse on green dot |
| Shimmer | Loading skeletons | CSS animation on skeleton bg |

### CSS Transitions (on all interactive elements)

```
transition-all duration-200    — default for hover/focus
transition-colors duration-200 — for color-only changes
```

---

## Component Quick Reference

### BottomNav
```
Container: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-bg-base/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-subtle z-50
Tab: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 min-w-[64px] py-2
Icon: lucide-react, w-6 h-6
Active: text-gold + bg-gold/10 rounded-full px-4 py-2 (pill around icon)
Inactive: text-text-secondary
Label: text-xs font-medium (Outfit)
```

### Card (default)
```
bg-card/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-subtle rounded-2xl p-4
hover:border-gold/20 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,215,0,0.08)]
transition-all duration-300
```

### Gold CTA Button
```
bg-gold text-bg-base font-semibold rounded-xl px-5 py-3 w-full
hover:scale-[1.02] hover:brightness-110 hover:shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(255,215,0,0.25)]
active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer
```

### Form Input
```
w-full bg-elevated border border-subtle rounded-xl px-4 py-3
text-text-primary placeholder:text-muted
focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-gold/40 focus:border-gold/50
transition-colors duration-200
```

### Step Indicator
```
Active:    w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gold text-bg-base font-display flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(255,215,0,0.3)]
Completed: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-green-live text-bg-base flex items-center justify-center (checkmark icon)
Future:    w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-card border border-subtle text-muted font-display flex items-center justify-center
Line:      h-0.5 flex-1 bg-subtle (fills with bg-gold when step complete)
```

### Tournament Chip
```
Unselected: bg-card border border-subtle rounded-xl px-4 py-3 cursor-pointer
            hover:border-gold/20 hover:bg-card-hover transition-all duration-200
Selected:   bg-gold/10 border border-gold/30 rounded-xl px-4 py-3
            text-gold shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(255,215,0,0.1)]
```

### Badge
```
Neutral: bg-card-hover text-text-secondary border border-subtle rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs
Gold:    bg-gold/10 text-gold border border-gold/20 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs
Live:    bg-green-live/10 text-green-live rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs (+ pulse dot)
Error:   bg-red-alert/10 text-red-alert rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs
```

### Avatar
```
bg-gradient-to-br from-gold to-amber-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
text-bg-base font-bold
Sizes: w-8 h-8 (nav) | w-10 h-10 (card) | w-12 h-12 (profile)
```

---

## Deprecated Tokens (KILL ON SIGHT)

These are OLD color classes from the previous design. Replace every instance:

| Old class | Replace with |
|---|---|
| text-gray-* | text-text-primary, text-text-secondary, or text-muted |
| bg-white | bg-card or bg-elevated |
| bg-gray-* | bg-card, bg-card-hover, or bg-elevated |
| border-gray-* | border-subtle |
| text-colombia-blue | text-gold or text-text-primary |
| bg-colombia-blue | bg-gold |
| text-colombia-yellow | text-gold |
| bg-colombia-yellow | bg-gold |
| ring-colombia-* | ring-gold/40 |
| divide-gray-* | divide-subtle or border-subtle |
